name: Sealegs
description: Multi-modeled stereo character delay with reverb. Three delay models (TAPE, BBD, DIGI) with per-model COLOR degradation; built-in syncable modulator (7 waveshapes + wow/flutter + envelope followers); feedback-loop VCF; spacious Fog reverb with repositionable signal-chain insertion.

controls.name: DRIVE
controls.description: Combination input level and overdrive. CCW = muted · noon = unity · CW past noon overdrives the delay. LED shows overdrive amount.
controls.detail: ALT + DRIVE sets input trim (0.5×–2.5×) · DRIVE position switch moves it in the chain

controls.name: FREEZE / ALT
controls.description: Tap to toggle delay freeze (loop the buffer indefinitely). Hold = ALT modifier for grey secondary parameters on other controls.

controls.name: NOISE / MODE
controls.description: Amount of hiss/crackle noise injected into the signal. ALT-held: selects noise mode — pre-delay hiss / crackle / post-delay hiss.
controls.detail: Standard = level · ALT = mode · noise type varies across knob sweep

controls.name: FOG / DECAY
controls.description: Reverb (Fog) level. ALT + FOG knob sets reverb decay time.

controls.name: FOG/DRIVE POSITION switch
controls.description: Moves Fog insertion point. IN = pre-delay · DLY = post-delay/pre-mix (wet only) · MIX = post-mix (affects wet + dry). ALT-hold moves DRIVE position instead.

controls.name: TAP TEMPO / AUX DEST
controls.description: Tap to set delay time when DELAY SYNC or MOD SYNC is active. ALT + tap cycles AUX CV destination (Drive, Noise, Mod, Fog, Mix).
controls.detail: AUX dest indicated by colour flash

controls.name: DELAY SYNC / FB CROSS
controls.description: Tap = toggle delay sync to external clock or tap tempo. ALT + tap = toggle Crossed Feedback — L feedback feeds R input and vice versa.

controls.name: MOD SYNC / MOD PHASE
controls.description: Tap = sync MOD RATE to clock/tap. ALT + tap = phase-invert internal MOD on right channel only (not MOD OUT jack).
controls.detail: Affects oscillating waveshapes only · W&F and EF do not sync

controls.name: MIX
controls.description: Wet/dry blend. CCW = dry only · CW = wet only.
controls.detail: Send/Return mode (hold DELAY SYNC on boot) removes dry entirely

controls.name: AUX CV attenuverter
controls.description: Scales ±polarity of AUX CV. Full CW = positive unity · noon = zero · full CCW = inverted unity.

controls.name: TIME/L slider
controls.description: Primary (or left) delay time. Free range depends on TIME RANGE switch; sync mode offers quarter-note to 64th-note divisions.
controls.detail: 3.125ms–6s free · clock-synced divisions up to x4/-64

controls.name: WIDTH/R slider
controls.description: Second delay time. PONG/T:W: offsets right delay 0–33% relative to left. L/R: sets right delay time independently.
controls.detail: Behavior depends on STEREO CONFIG switch

controls.name: FB slider
controls.description: Feedback amount — up to 160% allows runaway self-oscillation swells.

controls.name: TIME/WIDTH/FB CV attenuverters
controls.description: Each attenuverts its CV input. Noon = no CV · CCW = inverted.

controls.name: TIME RANGE switch
controls.description: L = long (200ms–6s) · M = med (50ms–1.5s) · S = short (3.125–93.75ms). When synced, L/M/S selects whole/16th/64th note base.

controls.name: STEREO CONFIG switch
controls.description: PONG (top) = serial ping-pong · T:W (mid) = parallel, WIDTH offsets right · L/R (bottom) = parallel with independent L and R times.

controls.name: MODEL switch
controls.description: TAPE (top) = tape emulation · BBD (mid) = bucket-brigade · DIGI (bottom) = digital. COLOR slider degrades model-specifically.

controls.name: MOD RATE slider
controls.description: Sets LFO rate for oscillating MOD waves, envelope-follower response rate, or wow vs flutter balance for W&F.

controls.name: MOD DEPTH slider
controls.description: Depth of internal MOD modulation on Delay Time. Does not affect MOD OUT jack which is always full amplitude.

controls.name: MOD knob
controls.description: MOD waveshape select. Standard: morphs through W&F, EF-, EF+, LFV, S&H, SQ, SINE, SAW, TRI, RAMP. ALT + turn: snaps to discrete waveform.

controls.name: COLOR slider
controls.description: Adds model-dependent degradation. TAPE = drag/dropouts · BBD = companded noise, clock instability · DIGI = bit-crush, sample-rate reduction.

controls.name: HIGHPASS FREQ slider
controls.description: VCF highpass cutoff. Inside the feedback loop — each repeat darkens/thins cumulatively. Outside the loop when FREEZE is active.

controls.name: LOWPASS FREQ slider
controls.description: VCF lowpass cutoff. Combined with highpass defines the feedback bandwidth.

controls.name: COLOR/HPF/LPF CV attenuverters
controls.description: Each attenuverts its corresponding CV input.

inputs.name: FREEZE
inputs.description: Gate input — high enables delay freeze, low unfreezes

inputs.name: CLK
inputs.description: Clock input for DELAY SYNC and MOD SYNC (16th-note reference)

inputs.name: AUX CV
inputs.description: Assignable CV input — destination selected by ALT + TAP TEMPO

outputs.name: MOD
outputs.description: Internal MOD waveform — always full amplitude regardless of MOD DEPTH slider

behaviors.name: Three delay models
behaviors.description: TAPE emulates reel-to-reel warmth with saturation and drift. BBD emulates bucket-brigade companding with sample-rate instability. DIGI is clean digital — COLOR becomes bit-crush/SR reduction at extreme settings.

behaviors.name: Model-dependent freeze
behaviors.description: BBD freeze accumulates signal loss (limited sample rate). TAPE freeze holds better but slowly saturates. DIGI freezes the buffer exactly and is immune to modulation/time changes while frozen.

behaviors.name: VCF in feedback loop
behaviors.description: Filters sit inside the delay feedback path — repeats progressively darken/thin each pass. Ideal for dub-style cascading tone changes. When frozen, the VCF moves outside the loop and affects only the output.

behaviors.name: Stereo configurations
behaviors.description: PONG sums L+R to mono and ping-pongs two serial delays. T:W runs delays in parallel with right offset by WIDTH. L/R runs both delays fully independently for true stereo — WIDTH/R directly sets right time.

behaviors.name: Crossed feedback
behaviors.description: Routes L feedback into R input and vice versa. Creates swapping stereo echoes; combined with L/R stereo config yields complex criss-crossing repeats.

behaviors.name: FOG position shifts character
behaviors.description: IN position lets reverb feed the delay — reverb builds into each repeat. DLY position puts reverb only on wet signal. MIX position applies reverb post-mix, affecting wet and dry together.

behaviors.name: Envelope-follower MOD
behaviors.description: MOD waveform becomes an envelope follower on the input signal. EF+ modulates delay time with input loudness (dynamic pitch bends); EF- inverts. RATE slider sets follower response speed.

behaviors.name: Wow & Flutter emulation
behaviors.description: Classic tape mechanical pitch instability. RATE slider balance between wow (slow drift) and flutter (fast warble). Combined with TAPE model gives convincing vintage tape flavour.

behaviors.name: AUX CV destinations
behaviors.description: Cycles AUX CV destination through 5 parameters: Drive (magenta), Noise (yellow), MOD wave (white), Fog (green), Mix (blue). One CV lane for whichever parameter you need.

behaviors.name: Runaway feedback
behaviors.description: Feedback goes to 160%, producing self-sustaining swells that increase in volume. Use HPF/LPF to tame frequency buildup; long-press DELAY SYNC to clear the buffer.

behaviors.name: MOD OUT as LFO source
behaviors.description: Dedicated MOD output delivers the selected waveshape at full ±10V amplitude — ignores MOD DEPTH. Makes Sealegs a clock-syncable LFO/S&H source for the rest of the rack.

patchIdeas.name: Dub delay with tone-darkening repeats
patchIdeas.patch: Audio → IN L · MODEL BBD · COLOR ~50% · FB 60% · HPF low, LPF ~3 o'clock · DELAY SYNC to external clock · each repeat darkens progressively · live LPF tweaks dub-style
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MODEL: BBD · COLOR: 50% · FB: 60%
* STEREO: PONG · DELAY SYNC: ON

Clock:

- Synth (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Clock (Out) c> Sealegs (CLK)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Shoegaze ambient wash
patchIdeas.patch: MODEL TAPE · COLOR high · FOG position MIX · FOG level high · decay long (ALT + FOG) · MOD = SINE, sync'd · slight DEPTH · MIX 70% wet · swelling tape reverb with gentle chorus
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MODEL: TAPE · COLOR: high
* FOG POSITION: MIX · FOG: 70% · DECAY: long
* MOD: SINE synced · MOD DEPTH: 20%

Pad:

- Pad (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Karplus-Strong string
patchIdeas.patch: Short trigger burst → IN L · MODEL DIGI · TIME very short (S range) · FB 100%+ · HPF mid / LPF mid · pitched plucked string tones — each trigger excites the resonant feedback loop
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MODEL: DIGI · TIME RANGE: S
* FB: 100% · HPF/LPF: mid

Noise:

ENV:

VCA:

- Trig (Out) t> ENV (Gate)
- Noise (Out) -> VCA (In)
- ENV (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sync'd ping-pong eighth-notes
patchIdeas.patch: Audio → IN L · STEREO CONFIG PONG · DELAY SYNC ON · TIME slider on 1/8 division · WIDTH adds 33% offset on right · FB 40% · classic rhythmic stereo delay that locks to tempo
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* STEREO: PONG · MODEL: DIGI
* DELAY SYNC: ON · TIME: 1/8

Clock:

- Synth (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Clock (Out) c> Sealegs (CLK)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: MOD as rack-wide LFO
patchIdeas.patch: MOD knob SINE · MOD SYNC ON to master clock · MOD OUT → external filter cutoff · Sealegs also processes audio · one module gives you a clock-synced LFO and a delay simultaneously
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MOD: SINE · MOD SYNC: ON

Clock:

VCF:

- Clock (Out) c> Sealegs (CLK)
- Audio (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Sealegs (MOD) >> VCF (Cutoff) // tempo-synced LFO
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Envelope-follower pitch bend
patchIdeas.patch: Drum bus → IN L · MODEL TAPE · MOD = EF+ · MOD DEPTH ~30% · RATE slider mid · loud hits push delay time briefly, creating pitch-bend artifacts that lock to the performance
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MODEL: TAPE
* MOD: EF+ · DEPTH: 30% · RATE: mid

- Drums (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Digital-freeze granular freeze chord
patchIdeas.patch: Play a chord · MODEL DIGI · tap FREEZE at the peak · frozen buffer loops forever (DIGI holds exactly) · modulate HPF/LPF live to morph timbre of the frozen loop · play lead over it
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* MODEL: DIGI · FREEZE: ON

LFO:

- Chord (Out) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- LFO (Out) >> Sealegs (LPF CV)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Crossed-feedback stereo chaos
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo source · STEREO CONFIG L/R with independent times · ALT + DELAY SYNC to enable FB CROSS · echoes ping back and forth between channels in non-repeating patterns · set L and R to prime-number ms times for evolving stereo
patchIdeas.diagram:
Sealegs:
* STEREO: L/R · FB CROSS: ON
* TIME: 287ms · WIDTH: 431ms

- Synth (L) -> Sealegs (IN L)
- Synth (R) -> Sealegs (IN R)
- Sealegs (OUT L) -> Output (Left)
- Sealegs (OUT R) -> Output (Right)
